name: Pathmark Local App Windows
label: Desktop-site phone viewport
release_notes: Makes phone browsers render Pathmark using the same wide desktop canvas that looks polished in Desktop site mode, rather than a separate narrow mobile layout.
notes: Adds an explicit wide viewport request so normal phone browsers should render the same polished desktop canvas seen in Desktop site mode.
Keeps phone access to the same Pathmark UI and data rather than maintaining a separate phone-app layout.
Preserves the theme-matched printable tasklist cleanup from v0.7.14.
